posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!

One of the things I love about monday.com is how easily it becomes the central hub for work. With Aircall, you can bring all your phone conversations right into your boards.

Here’s how it works:

  • Every call and message (inbound or outbound) automatically logs in monday.com (SMS & WhatsApp).
  • You can instantly see call details alongside your CRM or project items.
  • Missed calls or voicemails? They get tracked too, so nothing falls through the cracks.

Combine this with automations and you can trigger follow-up tasks or reminders based on call outcomes.

If your team spends time on the phone with clients, this integration can be a total game-changer. You’ll never lose track of conversations again.

Check out Aircall here!
